---
title: "Missing Data Simulation Study"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-09"
---

#Build a simulated RCBD Dataset
```{r}
#Set Seed
set.seed(42)

#Set initial parameters (these can change)
n_treatments <- 8
n_blocks <- 7

#Define Treatment and Block vectors
treatments <- paste0("T", 1:n_treatments)
blocks     <- paste0("Block", 1:n_blocks)

#Treatment and block effects 
treatment_effects <- c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8)
block_effects <- c(1,1,1,1,1,1,1)
error <- rnorm(n_treatments * n_blocks, 0, 3)

#Build Dataframe
rcbd_df <- expand.grid(
  Treatment = treatments,
  Block     = blocks)

#Treatment Effects  
rcbd_df$treatment_effect <- treatment_effects[as.numeric(factor(rcbd_df$Treatment))]

#Block Effects
rcbd_df$block_effect <- block_effects[as.numeric(factor(rcbd_df$Block))]

#Response 
rcbd_df$response <- rcbd_df$treatment_effect + 
                    rcbd_df$block_effect + 
                    error
#Clean Up
rcbd_df$treatment_effect <- NULL
rcbd_df$block_effect     <- NULL

rcbd_df$Treatment <- factor(rcbd_df$Treatment)
rcbd_df$Block     <- factor(rcbd_df$Block)

#Preview
head(rcbd_df)

```
